description: One dialogue window within a talk_proc. Contains the window's own text (variable length) and a fixed-size array of choice options.

serialized_layout.name: text_len
serialized_layout.description: Length of the window text in UTF-16LE code units (characters).

serialized_layout.name: num_option
serialized_layout.description: Number of choice options (buttons) in this window.

notes: text_len=0 is valid and produces an empty text block (no bytes read for text).
num_option=0 is valid (window with no player choices, e.g., a final acknowledgment screen).
Sanity check: text_len > 65535 or num_option > 1000 is treated as corrupt.
